content.body: Reminder: today at 4 PM we have the extensions drafting call
Btw in the end the extensions topic is “up for grabs” if someone wants to own it.

I wrote some questions for us to ask the European Commission, based on our discussions over the past few weeks and how things went when attempting to draft requirements and assessments. It'd be great to have your feedback and edits. I'd like to send this to them by the end of the week, so that I can schedule a meeting in the subsequent week or two. https://pad.softwarefreedom.net/code/#/2/code/edit/eWbRVcJFD1XTitTFVmTBEXns/
good stuff, i'll take a look later on today after our drafting call
Note, we're restarting in 4 minutes at https://meet.goto.com/ETSICYBER
we're taking notes in our extensions drafting session at https://pad.softwarefreedom.net/code/#/2/code/edit/khZxnOsTu2xbGs34zNjUPzM1/
